_comment: Per-model pricing for cost reporting. Verify against https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing if rates drift. All prices in USD per 1,000,000 tokens.

gemini-3.1-pro-preview.notes: Output price INCLUDES thinking tokens. Tier breakpoint at 200,000 prompt tokens. Batch tier is 50% cheaper but adds latency; we use standard.

claude-opus-4-7.notes: Approximate — only relevant if we ever switch the judge to cross-vendor.
